escalation.rationale: Second consecutive day of US-Iran military exchanges with Trump threatening continued bombing if Iran rejects peace deal.

ticker_items: US launches second day of strikes across Iran
Iran retaliates with attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait
House passes War Powers Resolution to end Iran conflict
Ukraine strikes Russian regional capital Cheboksary, 3 injured
Xi Jinping concludes rare state visit to North Korea

new_entrant.text: Bahrain and Kuwait became direct targets as Iran retaliated against US strikes with attacks on Gulf states.

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian missile and drone attack on Russian regional capital resulted in three injuries.

middle_east.description: US military conducted second day of strikes against Iranian military targets.
Iran launched retaliatory strikes on Bahrain following US attacks.
Iranian forces targeted sites in Kuwait as part of broader retaliation.

middle_east.text: Leave if you want to be safe
middle_east.speaker: Abbas Araghchi
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: I will continue bombing Iran if it refuses to agree to an interim peace deal
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Xi Jinping completed rare state visit to North Korea, deepening military cooperation ties with Kim Jong Un. The visit marked Xi's first foreign travel this year and strengthened China-North Korea alignment amid regional tensions.

UK Surgeon General participated in NATO medical readiness meetings in North Macedonia. Defence analysts called for ending infighting over defence spending and preparing Britain for potential conflict with Russia.

Mercedes-Benz announced new anti-drone vehicle deal as part of Europe's broader defense industry push. The partnership reflects European automakers' pivot toward military applications amid regional security concerns.

financial.notes: Treasury yields remained steady despite Middle East escalation as investors monitored inflation data alongside Iran conflict developments.

update_log.text: House passes War Powers Resolution 215-208 directing Trump to end Iran conflict
US completes second wave of strikes on Iranian military targets
Iran launches retaliatory attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait sites
Ukrainian missile strike hits Cheboksary in central Russia, 3 wounded
